message:
🌱 Add open-webui: Latest Node Docker image breaks build mission (#1350)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-webui-7616-latest-node-docker-image-breaks-build",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-webui: Latest Node Docker image breaks build",
+    "description": "Latest Node Docker image breaks build. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-webui deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-webui version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nhelm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-webui installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-webui configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui\n```\nThe latest node image breaks the build.\n\nLatest: ` docker.io/library/node:22-alpine3.20:96cc8323e25c8cc6ddcb8b965e135cfd57846e8003ec0d7bcec16c5fd5f6d39f`\n\nPinning the image to the previous version still works:\n\n`FROM --platform=$BUILDPLATFORM"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Latest Node Docker image breaks build",
+        "description": "I was also facing same issue. And I looked for some explanation. Here is how it needs to be solved as I found from sources.\n\n**********\n\nWhen configuring Tailwind CSS, especially in projects using ES Modules (like those built with Vite), it's recommended to use **import instead of require**. This\n```yaml\n#20 13.11 ReferenceError: require is not defined\n#20 13.11     at file:///app/tailwind.config.js:39:11\n#20 13.11     at ModuleJobSync.runSync (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:395:35)\n#20 13.11     at ModuleLoader.importSyncForRequire (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:329:47)\n#20 13.11     at loadESMFromCJS (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1414:24)\n#20 13.11     at Module._compile (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1547:5)\n#20 13.11     at Object..js (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1677:16)\n#20 13.11     at Module.load (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1318:32)\n#20 13.11     at Function.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Latest Node Docker image breaks build\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I was also facing same issue. And I looked for some explanation. Here is how it needs to be solved as I found from sources.\n\n**********\n\nWhen configuring Tailwind CSS, especially in projects using ES Modules (like those built with Vite), it's recommended to use **import instead of require**.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "#20 13.11 ReferenceError: require is not defined\n#20 13.11     at file:///app/tailwind.config.js:39:11\n#20 13.11     at ModuleJobSync.runSync (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:395:35)\n#20 13.11     at ModuleLoader.importSyncForRequire (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:329:47)\n#20 13.11     at loadESMFromCJS (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1414:24)\n#20 13.11     at Module._compile (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1547:5)\n#20 13.11     at Object..js (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1677:16)\n#20 13.11     at Module.load (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1318:32)\n#20 13.11     at Function._load (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1128:12)\n#20 13.11     at TracingChannel.traceSync (node:diagnostics_channel:322:14)\n#20 13.11     at wrapModuleLoad (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:219:24)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
